channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 7th May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-24, Luxford Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole/dip in road next to mini roundabout, 7th May
item.description:
The pot hole/dip in the road is in the edge of the roundabout and affects cars as they leave the roundabout and drive onto townley road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th May
item.description:
Flytipping inc fridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135-169, Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned, 7th May
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked here for a few days and not moved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jasmine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing cover, 7th May
item.description:
There is an open hole in the road where the pipe cover is missing. It’s been like it for about a month now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on pavement, 7th May
item.description:
Dog poo on pavement. Regular occurrence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin forgotten +2 guitars and three waste bags, 7th May
item.description:
Been forgotten from yesterday’s collection

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-16, Withens Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Larger pail of rubbish blocking pavement, 7th May
item.description:
This hot spot is regular and should be monitored daily

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waterloo passage, 7th May
item.description:
Multiple fly tips along the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterloo Passage, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Baby cot flytipped by flat 28 wilton house, 7th May
item.description:
Flat 28 Wilton house east dulwich estate has flytipped a baby cot, they left it outside their flat then dumped it in the passageway of wilton house which is continnuing to block communal passageway, see images.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albrighton Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped recycling bin, 7th May
item.description:
Dumped recycling bin with rubbish all over pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Liberty Close, 7th May
item.description:
Note on app it say Enfield is not responsible for here but it is.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 7th May
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: St Georges flag attached to lamppost, 7th May
item.description:
Over night someone has attached a St George's flag to lamp post
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lodge Lane, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pail of rubbish and old couch, 7th May
item.description:
Large amount of waste some of it set on fire recently-this location should be monitored regularly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping side of Fareshares - NOT resolved, 7th May
item.description:
This issue of flytipping was reported in the earlier in the week and marked as resolved. It hasn’t been. See photo - bed frame, lots of bags and litter. Please can this be tidied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridges!, 7th May
item.description:
This used to be an appliance shop but is no longer. Landlord took property back. It’s now empty People have started leaving all their old broke. Fridges outside on the public path causing obstruction. Whilst

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Philip Lane, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 7th May
item.description:
Dead fox on pavement on Tudor way just at the section under the railway bridge - right hand side of road heading towards Queensway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in middle of road near achool, 7th May
item.description:
A fresh dead fox is dead in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lewisham residents on the other aide of the street have dumped a sofa blocking the enterance to my garage, 7th May
item.description:
Residents of Lewisham (see photo) have dumped a sofa outside the enterance to my garage and I can no longer access it accross the pavement. The details of the person who has done this (this is the second incident this week) are on the sofa.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
